title: Add AI Image Gallery to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A gallery for your generations
gist.blurb: A brand new AI Image Gallery just dropped into the ecosystem! Now you can browse, tag, and organize your generated masterpieces with ease.
gist.summary: Added the AI Image Gallery app to the community showcase, allowing users to browse, tag, and organize their generated images.
gist.impact: Users now have a dedicated tool to filter, preview metadata, and group their AI-generated images into collections.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing framed pixel-art pictures in a cozy wooden gallery or greenhouse. The robot is holding a picture frame, and Polly is hanging one on the wall. Lots of lime green accents and warm lighting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing framed pictures in a warm wooden gallery. The robot holds a small picture frame showing a landscape, while the bee hovers nearby wearing a tiny painter's beret. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
